title: Applepresso — controlled cafe-ordering redesign
disclosure: The before screen is a deliberately generic baseline, not a customer product. Applepresso is a repository-owned fictional concept used to test the OmD workflow. It is not affiliated with Apple, Baemin, or Banapresso and uses no official production assets or logos from those companies.

runtime.currentVersionNote: OmD v1.9 uses native channel paths and does not require MCP.

presentation.description: The mobile flow frames and 20-second walkthrough are an edited presentation assembled after the initial three-page, 34-asset run. The video is not a real-time Codex screen recording.

limitations: Native contact-sheet crops are less consistent than campaign photography.
The controlled baseline was authored for the experiment and is not production telemetry.
This historical prompt predates the current MCP-free installer contract.
The 18-minute measurement covers the initial three-page and 34-asset generation only, not the later mobile presentation edit.
